---
title: QuartoDashboard
subtitle: "Auto-Height Card Styling"
format: dashboard
---

> Quarto Dashboard Syntax, no Svelte

# Page 1

## Row {layout="flow"}

::: {.card-body .d-flex .flow-content .flex-row .gap-2 .mb-0 .p-1 }

<button type="button" class="btn btn-primary flex-fill">
  Action
</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-primary flex-fill">
 Help
</button>
<button type="button" class="btn btn-warning flex-fill">
  RAZ
</button>
:::

## Row 

### Main Content
This row will now take up all the *remaining* space because the row above is set to "flow" (auto-height).

NB: there is bslib::grid gap between cards and no-margin between cards.
PS: apply Bootstrap mb-0 margin bottom and p-1 padding
.card-body .p-1 .mb-0
